overview.title: Funding & Transfer Hub
overview.subtitle: View balances and move assets directly in the app.
overview.connectTitle: Connect a wallet to start transferring
overview.connectDescription: The connected wallet is used for signatures and transfers.
overview.loadError: Unable to load transfer overview right now.
overview.walletSubtitle: Connected account and current HyperEVM network status.
overview.calloutCoreGasBody: Moving funds from HyperCore to HyperEVM requires HYPE on HyperCore / Spot.
overview.calloutEvmGasBody: Moving funds from HyperEVM back to HyperCore requires HYPE on HyperEVM.
overview.transferCardSubtitle: Choose direction, asset, and amount for your transfer.
overview.awaitingCoreSignature: Confirm the HyperCore transfer signature in your wallet.
overview.awaitingEvmSignature: Confirm the HyperEVM transaction in your wallet.
overview.queuedSuccess: Transfer submitted on HyperCore and queued for the next HyperEVM block.
overview.confirmedSuccess: Transfer confirmed on HyperEVM and forwarded to HyperCore.

history.title: Funding History
history.subtitle: Lightweight funding timeline for detectable in-app actions.
history.connectTitle: Connect a wallet to view funding history
history.connectDescription: History is only shown for the connected wallet.
history.trackingNoteFallback: External handoffs are not fully tracked.
history.emptyDescription: This page only shows lightweight in-app action history.

errors.unsupportedAsset: This asset is not supported for the selected direction yet.
errors.switchToHyperEvm: Switch the connected wallet to HyperEVM to continue.
errors.switchToArbitrum: Switch the connected wallet to Arbitrum to continue.
errors.actionUnavailable: This transfer action is unavailable right now.

bridge.title: Arbitrum <-> HyperCore bridge
bridge.subtitle: Move native Arbitrum USDC to and from HyperCore with the official Hyperliquid bridge.
bridge.explanation: Deposits use an onchain Arbitrum wallet transaction to the official bridge contract. Withdrawals use a separate signed Hyperliquid action. These are different mechanisms with different timing.
bridge.creditedLocationNote: Bridge deposits are credited to {location}, not the spot wallet.
bridge.timingSummary: Deposits are usually under 1 minute. Withdrawals usually take 3–4 minutes.
bridge.safetyValue: Only native Arbitrum USDC is supported. No server-side custody or private-key storage is involved.
bridge.connectTitle: Connect a wallet to use the bridge
bridge.connectDescription: Bridge actions are signed directly in your browser wallet.
bridge.loadError: Unable to load bridge overview right now.

errors.switchToArbitrum: Switch the connected wallet to Arbitrum to continue.
errors.bridgeUnavailable: Bridge metadata is unavailable right now.

deposit.title: Deposit: Arbitrum -> HyperCore
deposit.subtitle: Send native USDC from Arbitrum into HyperCore via the official bridge.
deposit.awaitingSignature: Confirm the bridge deposit transaction in your wallet.
deposit.pending: Deposit submitted. Waiting for HyperCore credit.
deposit.stillPending: Deposit is still pending on the official bridge.

withdraw.title: Withdraw: HyperCore -> Arbitrum
withdraw.subtitle: Sign an official Hyperliquid withdraw action to release USDC back to Arbitrum.
withdraw.awaitingSignature: Confirm the Hyperliquid withdraw signature in your wallet.
withdraw.pending: Withdraw submitted. Waiting for bridge processing.

spotPerp.title: Hyperliquid Spot <-> Perps USDC
spotPerp.subtitle: Move credited USDC between the Hyperliquid spot wallet and perps wallet without leaving the app.
spotPerp.connectTitle: Connect a wallet to rebalance Spot and Perps
spotPerp.connectDescription: This uses an official signed Hyperliquid action directly from your browser wallet.
spotPerp.loadError: Unable to load Spot / Perps balances right now.
spotPerp.explanation: Bridge deposits and Spot / Perps rebalancing are separate steps. First bridge the funds into Hyperliquid, then rebalance them between the internal wallets if needed.
spotPerp.bridgeCreditsNote: Bridge deposits arrive in {location} first. Use this step if you want the funds in Spot instead.
spotPerp.chainHint: This is a signed Hyperliquid account action. No onchain bridge transaction is sent here.
spotPerp.switchToArbitrum: Switch the connected wallet to Arbitrum to sign this Hyperliquid action.
spotPerp.awaitingSignature: Confirm the Hyperliquid Spot / Perps transfer signature in your wallet.
spotPerp.pending: Transfer submitted. Waiting for the balance move to show up.
spotPerp.stillPending: The transfer is still pending on Hyperliquid.
